hero.place: Chocen · every first Sunday in December
hero.claim: A forest cross that tests you on every climb. Short, intense, and unforgiving, with steep uphills and fast technical descents.

overview.title: It is not a run. It is a challenge.
body: Mala cena Velke Verandy is a traditional forest cross in the heart of the Chocen woods. In just 4300 meters you get everything that makes trail racing memorable: steep climbs, technical descents, and roots underfoot.
The short distance tempts you to underestimate it. The profile corrects that quickly. This is a race with character for hobby runners and seasoned racers alike.

heritage.label: editions of tradition and hundreds of runners on the start line

cards.title: Short, but brutal
cards.description: 4300 m that force you to go hard from start to finish. No space for a gentle warm-up.

cards.title: Technical terrain
cards.description: Forest roads, narrow paths, roots, and mud. A course where technique and courage matter.

cards.title: Atmosphere and tradition
cards.description: A cold December Sunday, cheering spectators, and legendary climbs. A race with soul.

profile.title: Four climbs. Four descents. No excuses.
profile.description: An elevation profile that never lets go. Every meter of climbing is noticeable.

stats.title: 4 climbs
stats.description: Clear uphill sections that test your legs and your head.

stats.title: 4 steep descents
stats.description: Technical downhill running where confidence matters.

stats.title: Forest surface
stats.description: Roads, paths, roots, and December mud.

info.title: Everything you need to know

cards.title: Check-in
cards.description: 9:00-10:30 at the finish by Velka Veranda. Pick up your bib and chip.

cards.title: Start
cards.description: Mass start of the main race at 11:00. Kids races start from 10:00.

cards.title: Categories
cards.description: Men, women, masters, and juniors. There is a contest for everyone.

cards.title: Entry fee
cards.description: CZK 200 in pre-registration, CZK 300 on site. Kids race free.

cards.title: Refreshments
cards.description: Hot tea, sausage, and something stronger to warm up at the finish.

cards.title: Facilities
cards.description: Heated changing rooms, toilets, and indoor seating at Velka Veranda.

info.contactTitle: Have a question? Contact the organizer.

gallery.title: The atmosphere of a freezing Sunday
gallery.description: Mud, fog, finish-line emotion, and climbs that take everything out of you.
alt: A runner climbs a rocky trail in a winter forest.
Topographic map of the forest course.
Runners in a foggy winter forest.
Detail of a dark trail loop map.

partners.title: A race held together by a group of enthusiasts
partners.organizer: Organized by K.O.B. Chocen, z.s. in cooperation with the town of Chocen.

finalCta.title: Ready for four climbs?
finalCta.description: Start slots disappear faster than your legs on the fourth climb. Secure your bib for the next edition.

footer.description: A traditional forest cross in Chocen. 4300 meters, 200 meters of elevation gain, and a character you will remember.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Mala cena Velke Verandy · K.O.B. Chocen, z.s.
footer.made: Made with respect for the forest.

header.title: Race program
header.lead: All practical race information in one place: date, entry fee, categories, arrival, and facilities. Read the program before you head into the woods.

sections.title: Date and time
sections.body: The main race starts at 11:00, kids races from 9:30. The awards ceremony is planned for 13:30 in the race center.

sections.title: Race center
sections.body: Check-in, changing rooms, and the finish are in one place. The start is roughly 300 meters from the center.

sections.title: Arrival and parking
sections.summary: Parking by the sports hall and in nearby streets
sections.body: Please arrive with enough time. After 10:30, traffic near the start will be managed by organizers.

sections.title: Entry fee
sections.summary: CZK 200 in advance, CZK 300 on site
sections.body: Kids races are free. The fee includes chip timing, finish refreshments, and race facilities.

sections.title: Categories
sections.body: Categories will be confirmed based on registrations. The organizer may merge categories with low participation.

sections.title: Check-in and registration
sections.body: On-site registration is available until capacity is reached. Pick up your bib and chip no later than 30 minutes before the start.

sections.title: Courses
sections.body: Forest roads, paths, short steep climbs, and technical descents. Kids courses will be marked near the race center.

sections.title: Facilities and refreshments
sections.summary: Changing rooms, toilets, hot tea, and finish refreshments
sections.body: Warm refreshments will be available after the finish. Please follow organizer instructions and keep the race area clean.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.description: Secure your place on the next edition's start line and arrive with time to spare.
